tasks.label: ▶ Start Bot (Paper)
tasks.command: pkill -f oanda_trading_engine.py 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; cd /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_PHOENIX && source venv/bin/activate && python oanda_trading_engine.py

tasks.label: ⏹ Stop Bot
tasks.command: pkill -f oanda_trading_engine.py && echo '✅ Bot stopped' || echo '⚠️ No bot running'

tasks.label: 🔄 Restart Bot
tasks.command: pkill -f oanda_trading_engine.py 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; cd /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_PHOENIX && source venv/bin/activate && python oanda_trading_engine.py

tasks.label: 📜 Narration Log (live tail)
🔒 Mode → Paper
tasks.command: cd /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_PHOENIX && python3 -c "import json; f='configs/runtime_mode.json'; d=json.load(open(f)); d['mode']='PAPER'; json.dump(d,open(f,'w'),indent=2); print('Mode: PAPER')"
